selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was a named immediate reduction target on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the active control spine into a smaller controller-usable boundary packet without rereading raw source or touching active A2.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Best next sibling after the foundational control-spine packet is narrowed.
Best next active-A2 sibling once the control-spine boundary packet is established.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the low-entropy control-spine clusters and contradictions needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: REPO_SHAPE_BEFORE_MUTATION_GATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Gives the controller a compact repo-shape and write-zone gate before cleanup or mutation decisions.

candidate_items.name: OWNER_MODEL_MUTATION_GEOMETRY_LOCK
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent owner-model packet into a direct controller rule for allowed mutation and evidence flow.

candidate_items.name: NONOWNER_HELPER_SURFACE_FILTER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Lets the controller keep helper packets useful without letting them outrank owner docs or active process.

candidate_items.name: A2_ACTIVE_LOOP_VS_CANONICAL_SCHEMA_BOUNDARY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Gives the controller a smaller rule for distinguishing active A2 loop surfaces from canonical schema/seal machinery.

candidate_items.name: ZIP_PROTOCOL_VS_OPERATIONAL_ZIP_DOCTRINE_SPLIT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strict packet-law versus broader operational ZIP doctrine split for controller dispatch and audit.

quarantined_items.name: A1_QUOTA_TABLE_COLLAPSE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent preserves a real macro-versus-micro quota split rather than one settled controller-ready model.

quarantined_items.name: WRITE_TARGET_LAYOUT_AS_CURRENT_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Older workspace-layout guidance cannot be treated as already reconciled with the active intake-worker write surface.

notes: This batch was produced during controller queue cleanup as the first controller-facing A2-mid reduction from the current action board.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
